name: rung_451_frontier_story_counterfactual_retract_weave
utterances: Use gave/3, holds/2, warned/2, hid_in/2, secured/1.
assert rule secured(O) :- holds(P, O), hid_in(O, C).

utterances.utterance: By the fire Sera said that if she'd handed Rowan the ash_key he would've bolted, but that's the road-not-taken; what actually happened is she passed it to Noor, warned her, and Noor kept it.
clarification_answers: The part about Rowan is counterfactual and should not be asserted as fact.
Set gave(sera, noor, ash_key). Set warned(sera, noor). Set holds(noor, ash_key).

utterances: Set gave(sera, noor, ash_key). Set warned(sera, noor). Set holds(noor, ash_key).

utterances.utterance: Revision note from the same scene: Noor did not keep ash_key. Sera took ash_key back and tucked it in blue_tin. Keep the warning to Noor, and remove Noor handoff and holding facts.
clarification_answers: Retract gave(sera, noor, ash_key). Retract holds(noor, ash_key).
Set holds(sera, ash_key). Set hid_in(ash_key, blue_tin). Set warned(sera, noor).
